Container.Name: Jumpcoin-Qt
Container.Overview: Unofficial community-maintained Docker container for the Jumpcoin Qt wallet. Runs the wallet in a headless X server and exposes the GUI through noVNC in any modern browser - no display server, no VNC client required.
Container.Description:
USE AT YOUR OWN RISK. This is an unofficial, community-maintained container, not affiliated with the original Jumpcoin developers or the Jumperbillijumper YouTube channel.
The image runs jumpcoin-qt under a virtual framebuffer (Xvfb) with Openbox, exposes it through TigerVNC and a noVNC web bridge, and also runs the embedded full node (RPC available on port 31240). A desktop shortcut inside the VNC session lets you re-launch the wallet if it ever crashes.
Data (blockchain, wallet, config) is persisted under the Appdata Path you configure below. See the README for offline-backup instructions - the wallet.dat is the only authoritative copy of your coins.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: jumpcoin jump coin wallet crypto staking pos qt
Container.Requires: Docker with /dev/shm support. Image builds are pushed to ghcr.io on every v* tag.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: noVNC web UI - open http://<unraid-ip>:6080/vnc.html in a browser.

Config.Name: VNC Port
Config.Description: Raw VNC port for TigerVNC / Remmina clients.

Config.Name: RPC Port
Config.Description: JSON-RPC for external tools (block explorers, monitoring).

Config.Name: Appdata Path
Config.Description: Persistent blockchain, wallet, and config. See README for backup instructions.

Config.Name: peers.dat Path
Config.Description: Optional: a pre-seeded peers.dat file. Must be a single file (not a directory) on the host.

Config.Name: RPC Password
Config.Description: Password for JSON-RPC. CHANGE THIS from the default before exposing port 31240.

Config.Name: VNC Password
Config.Description: Password for the noVNC web UI and VNC. If empty, the VNC server runs without authentication (anyone on the network can connect).

Config.Name: RPC Allow IP
Config.Description: CIDR range allowed to call the JSON-RPC. Use 127.0.0.1 if you only call it from inside this container.

Config.Name: Shared Memory
Config.Description: /dev/shm size. Must be >= 256 MB for Qt to start.
